wikitext: {{Sequel Disambiguation}} {{Power Infobox|Weak|2}} {{BD|Weak||2}} is a {{2|Debuffs|Debuff}} both players and enemies can apply to their targets. While available to all characters, the {{KW|Silent||2}} has the some dedicated support for {{BD|Weak||2}}. While a character or enemy has {{BD|Weak||2}}, the damage of their {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack cards|2}} or enemy Attacks is decreased by 25% (typically), then rounded down. At the end of its turn, one point of {{BD|Weak||2}} is decremented from the player or enemy. == Sources == === On Player === {{C|Doubt||2}} ===Overgrowth=== *{{M|Kin Priest||2}} {{Int|Kin Priest|Orb of Weakness||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. ===Underdocks=== *{{M|Gremlin Merc||2}} {{Int|Gremlin Merc|Double Smash||2}}: 2 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Haunted Ship||2}} {{Int|Haunted Ship|Haunt||2}}: 2 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Punch Construct||2}} {{Int|Punch Construct|Fast Punch||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Sludge Spinner||2}} {{Int|Sludge Spinner|Oil Spray||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Waterfall Giant||2}} {{Int|Waterfall Giant|Stomp||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. ===Hive=== *{{M|Bowlbug (Silk)||2}} {{Int|Bowlbug (Silk)|Spin Web||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Decimillipede||2}} {{Int|Decimillipede|Outgas||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Crusher||2}} {{Int|Crusher|Bug Sting||2}}: 2 {{BD|Weak||2}}. ===Glory=== *{{M|Axebot||2}} {{Int|Axebot|Hammer Uppercut||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Slimed Berserker||2}} {{Int|Slimed Berserker|Leeching Hug||2}}: 3 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Soul Nexus||2}} {{Int|Soul Nexus|Drain Life||2}}: 2 {{BD|Weak||2}}. *{{M|Queen||2}} {{Int|Queen|You're Mine||2}}: 99 {{BD|Weak||2}}. ---- === On Enemies === ==== Cards ==== * {{C|Uppercut||2}}: 1(2) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Neutralize||2}}: 1(2) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Sucker Punch||2}}: 1(2) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Leg Sweep||2}}: 2(3) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Malaise||2}}: X(+1) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Suppress||2}}: 3(5) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Falling Star||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Know Thy Place||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Gamma Blast||2}}: 2 {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Comet||2}}: 3 {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Meteor Shower||2}}: 2 {{BD|Weak||2}} to ALL enemies. * {{C|Defy||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Deathbringer||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}} to ALL enemies. * {{C|Putrefy||2}}: 2(3) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Go for the Eyes||2}}: If the enemy intends to attack, 1(2) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Null||2}}: 2(3) {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{C|Shockwave||2}}: 3(5) {{BD|Weak||2}} to ALL enemies. ==== Relics ==== * {{R|Red Mask||2}}: Enemies start with 1 {{BD|Weak||2}}. ==== Potions ==== * {{P|Weak Potion||2}}: 3 {{BD|Weak||2}}. * {{P|Potion of Binding||2}}: 1 {{BD|Weak||2}} to ALL enemies. == Interactions == ===Synergies=== * {{C|Tracking||2}}: {{BD|Weak||2}} enemies take double damage from Attacks. * {{C|Debilitate||2}}: {{BD|Weak||2}} is twice as effective against the enemy for the next 3(4) turns. **Because {{C|Debilitate||2}} is a ''[[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]]'', it compounds with {{BD|Weak||2}} for ''all'' players during [[Slay the Spire 2:Multiplayer|Multiplayer]]. However {{R|Paper Krane||2}}'s effect benefits solely the player who controls it. ***Because {{C|Debilitate||2}} ''doubles'' {{BD|Weak||2}}'s damage reduction, players with {{R|Paper Krane||2}} will experience a total reduction of ''+80%'' less damage. * {{R|Paper Krane||2}}: Enemies with {{BD|Weak||2}} deal 40% less damage to you rather than 25%. * {{BD|Shrink|Shrink's|2}} debuff (30% attack reduction) is very similar to {{BD|Weak|Weak's|2}}, however because they are separate debuffs, they stack. * ''[[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]]'' Synergies ** {{C|Sleight of Flesh||2}}: Inflicts 9(13) damage to an enemy whenever they receive a debuff. ** {{C|Misery||2}}: Applies any debuffs on its target to ALL other enemies. ** {{C|Rend||2}}: Deals 5(8) additional damage for each unique debuff on an enemy. ** {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} doubles the first application of a [[Slay the Spire 2:Debuffs|Debuff]] via a played card during combat. === Order === * Additive effects such as {{KW|Strength||2}} are applied '''before''' multiplicative effects like {{BD|Weak||2}}. ** For example, if you have 4 {{KW|Strength||2}} while {{BD|Weak||2}} and play {{C|Sow||2}}, you will deal '''9''' damage ((8+4)×0.75) instead of '''10''' damage ((8×0.75)+4). ** Additive effects include {{KW|Strength||2}}, {{KW|Vigor||2}}, {{C|Accuracy||2}}, {{R|Strike Dummy||2}} and {{KW|Enchant|Enchantments|2}} such as {{KW|Sharp||2}}, {{KW|Vigorous||2}}, and {{KW|Momentum||2}}. ** Some common multiplicative effects are: {{BD|Vulnerable||2}}, {{BD|Weak||2}}, {{BD|Double Damage||2}}, {{R|Pen Nib||2}}, {{BD|Flutter||2}}, {{BD|Shrink||2}}, {{BD|Soar||2}}, {{BD|Slow||2}}, and {{BD|Surrounded||2}}. ====Rounding==== * Due to rounding, {{BD|Weak||2}} disproportionately affects attacks with a base damage value not divisible by 4, increasingly so the lower the value is, and the lower its remainder is when divided by 4. ** This extra damage mitigation is magnified when considering weak multi-hit attacks. ** For example, if an enemy intends to attack 5x3 with {{BD|Weak||2}}, each hit will only do 3 damage (5x0.75=3.75), totaling to 3x3=9 damage. This is a 40% reduction from the intended 15, instead of 25% as listed. ** If {{R|Paper Krane||2}} is in possession, then attacks' divisibility by '''5''' is the deciding factor, rather than 4. * The game always uses truncation (decimal part is chopped off, aka floor function) as its rounding method. * Rounding is applied only once, after all modifiers are calculated. Card text always shows rounded integers, even when the internal value is fractional. ** Example: You are {{BD|Weak||2}} and use {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strike+|2}} (base damage 9) against a {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} enemy. ** What the game shows (misleading path): *** Weak reduces the damage number displayed in your hand to 6 (from 9), due to rounding. *** You might then expect Vulnerable to increase this to 9 (6 × 1.5). ** What actually happens (real calculation, no intermediate rounding): *** Apply Weak: 9 × 0.75 = 6.75 *** Apply Vulnerable: 6.75 × 1.5 = 10.125 *** Final rounding: 10.125 → 10 === Effects Immune to Weak === * Damaging [[Slay the Spire 2:Relics|Relics]] and [[Slay_the_Spire_2:Orbs|Orbs]] do not interact with {{BD|Weak||2}}. * Both {{KW|Poison||2}} and {{KW|Doom||2}} are not affected by {{BD|Weak||2}}. * Only cards with the "{{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}}"-type suffer from {{BD|Weak||2}} ** For example, {{C|Inferno||2}}, {{C|Serpent Form||2}}, {{C|Capture Spirit||2}}, and {{C|The Bomb||2}} are '''not''' affected by {{BD|Weak||2}}. ** However, {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}} delivered by {{KW|Osty||2}} are '''not''' affected by {{BD|Weak||2}}. * Direct removal of [[Health|HP]] does not count as damage, and thus is not affected by {{BD|Weak||2}}. ** The secondary effects of the {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attacks|2}} {{C|Hemokinesis||2}}, {{C|Poisoned Stab||2}} and {{C|Strangle||2}} are not affected by {{BD|Weak||2}}. == Achievements == == Update History == [[Category:ToUpdate]] [[Category:Game Mechanics]]
